title: USDA Organic Certification
description: Maintain USDA organic certification per NOP standards for labeled organic products.

title: Bioengineered Food Disclosure
description: Disclose bioengineered ingredients per USDA National Bioengineered Food Disclosure Standard.

title: Plant Protection Act
description: Comply with plant health import/export requirements per Plant Protection Act.

title: Agricultural Grading Standards
description: Apply USDA grading standards for inspected commodities per Agricultural Marketing Act.

title: Produce Safety Rule
description: Comply with FSMA Produce Safety Rule for fruit and vegetable growing and harvesting.

title: Agricultural Water Standards
description: Apply microbial water quality standards for agricultural water per FSMA Produce Rule.

title: FIFRA Pesticide Registration
description: Use only registered pesticides per FIFRA with label-compliant application.

title: Worker Protection Standard
description: Implement WPS for agricultural workers handling pesticides per EPA.

title: CWA Agricultural Exemptions
description: Apply Clean Water Act Section 402 exemptions to routine agricultural activities.

title: CAFO Nutrient Management
description: Maintain Nutrient Management Plan for Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations.

title: Livestock Manure Management
description: Apply EPA livestock waste management standards for CAFO discharge.

title: OSHA Agricultural Operations
description: Apply OSHA agricultural operations standards where employer has 11+ employees.

title: Grain Handling Safety
description: Apply OSHA grain handling facilities standard for elevators and mills.

title: FDA CVM Animal Feed Rules
description: Comply with FDA Center for Veterinary Medicine animal feed safety requirements.

title: FSIS Inspection Services
description: Submit to USDA FSIS inspection for federally regulated meat and poultry.

title: HACCP for Meat and Poultry
description: Implement HACCP plans for federally regulated meat, poultry, and egg products.

title: FSMA Preventive Controls for Human Food
description: Implement Preventive Controls per FSMA for covered food facilities.

title: FSMA Preventive Controls for Animal Food
description: Implement Preventive Controls per FSMA for covered animal food facilities.

title: FSMA Intentional Adulteration Rule
description: Implement food defense plan for intentional adulteration per FSMA IA rule.

title: Sanitary Transportation Rule
description: Maintain sanitary transportation per FSMA for human and animal food.

title: FSMA FSVP
description: Verify foreign suppliers per FSMA Foreign Supplier Verification Program.

title: FSMA Traceability Rule
description: Maintain traceability records for high-risk foods per FSMA Section 204.

title: Conservation Compliance
description: Meet USDA NRCS conservation compliance for farm program eligibility.

title: Federal Crop Insurance
description: Apply USDA Federal Crop Insurance per Risk Management Agency rules.

title: Country of Origin Labeling
description: Apply USDA AMS COOL requirements for muscle cuts and ground meats.

title: NOP Organic Record Retention
description: Maintain organic operation records for 5 years per NOP.

title: Farm Labor FLSA Rules
description: Apply FLSA agricultural exemptions and minimum wage rules correctly.

title: MSPA Worker Protections
description: Comply with Migrant and Seasonal Agricultural Worker Protection Act.

title: H-2A Agricultural Worker Program
description: Comply with H-2A program requirements for temporary agricultural workers.

title: NEPA Environmental Review
description: Apply NEPA environmental review for federal agricultural actions.

title: Endangered Species Act
description: Apply ESA protections to pesticide use affecting listed species.

title: Swampbuster Wetland Conservation
description: Avoid farming wetlands without conservation plan per Swampbuster.

title: Animal Welfare Act
description: Comply with AWA for research, exhibition, and dealer activities with animals.

title: Animal Disease Surveillance
description: Report reportable animal diseases to USDA APHIS per state requirements.

title: Humane Methods of Slaughter Act
description: Apply humane handling and slaughter methods per HMSA.

title: Food Defect Action Levels
description: Apply FDA food defect action levels for natural or unavoidable defects.

title: GLOBALG.A.P. Certification
description: Maintain GLOBALG.A.P. Good Agricultural Practices for covered products.

title: SQF Certification
description: Maintain SQF food safety certification for covered commodities.

title: TSCA Chemical Control
description: Comply with TSCA requirements for chemicals used in agricultural processing.

title: State-Specific Agricultural Rules
description: Comply with state Department of Agriculture rules for intrastate commerce.

title: Hemp Production
description: Comply with hemp production rules per USDA Domestic Hemp Production Program.

title: Livestock Air Quality
description: Apply Clean Air Act requirements to CAFO air emissions where applicable.

title: Dietary Supplements GMP
description: Apply FDA cGMP for dietary supplement manufacturing.

title: Good Farming Practices
description: Apply Good Farming Practices for federal crop insurance eligibility.

title: CERCLA Hazardous Substance Reporting
description: Report releases of hazardous substances per CERCLA.

title: EPCRA for Agricultural Facilities
description: Report EHS and TRI per EPCRA for agricultural processing facilities.

title: Food Contact Substances
description: Use only FDA-approved food contact substances in agricultural packaging.

title: Human Food cGMP
description: Apply FDA Current Good Manufacturing Practice for human food processing.

title: NASS Agricultural Census
description: Respond to USDA NASS Census of Agriculture and surveys as required.

title: EU Common Agricultural Policy
description: Comply with EU Common Agricultural Policy for EU-sold agricultural products.

title: EU Organic Regulation
description: Maintain EU organic certification for EU-sold organic products.

title: EU Plant Health Regulation
description: Comply with EU Plant Health Regulation for plants and plant products.

title: EU Animal Health Law
description: Comply with EU Animal Health Law for livestock health and movement.

title: EU GMO Labeling
description: Label GMO food products per EU Regulation 1829/2003 and 1830/2003.

title: Farm to Fork Strategy
description: Align with EU Farm to Fork Strategy sustainability targets.

title: Lawful Basis for Farm Worker Data
description: Document lawful basis for farm worker personal data processing.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC Common Criteria for security.

title: Agriculture ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for agricultural business systems including farm records.

title: Environmental Management System
description: Establish EMS per ISO 14001 for farm environmental impacts.

title: ISO 22000 Food Safety
description: Establish FSMS per ISO 22000 for food chain operations.

title: Agricultural Burning Rules
description: Comply with state and local agricultural burning regulations.

title: Veterinary Biologics Act
description: Use only USDA-licensed veterinary biologics per VSTA.

title: Supplements cGMP
description: Apply FDA dietary supplement cGMP for manufacturing and labeling.

title: Safe Drinking Water Act
description: Comply with SDWA for public water systems serving agricultural operations.

title: Wetland Reserve Program
description: Apply Wetland Reserve Program rules for enrolled lands.

title: Grower-Shipper Agreements
description: Comply with grower-shipper contract terms and Perishable Agricultural Commodities Act.

title: Commodity Check-Off Programs
description: Remit check-off assessments per USDA AMS commodity promotion orders.

title: Integrated Farm Assurance
description: Apply GlobalG.A.P. Integrated Farm Assurance standards.

title: Good Manufacturing Practice Packaging
description: Apply GMP to food packaging manufacture and handling.

title: Federal Grain Inspection
description: Submit grain to USDA FGIS inspection for official weights and grades.

title: USDA Marketing Orders
description: Comply with federal marketing orders for covered commodities.

title: FDA Food Labeling
description: Apply FDA food labeling requirements including nutrition facts panel.

title: USDA BRS Biotechnology Rules
description: Comply with USDA APHIS BRS regulations for bioengineered plants.

title: Low-Acid Canned Food Regulations
description: Register low-acid canned food facilities and file process schedules with FDA.

title: Juice HACCP Rule
description: Apply HACCP to juice processing per FDA Juice HACCP rule.

title: Seafood HACCP Rule
description: Apply HACCP to seafood processing per FDA Seafood HACCP rule.

title: FDA Shell Egg Safety Rule
description: Apply Shell Egg Safety Rule for shell egg producers.

title: FSIS Label Approval
description: Obtain FSIS label approval for covered meat and poultry products.

title: Codex Alimentarius Standards
description: Apply Codex Alimentarius food safety standards for international trade.

title: Pesticide Worker Training
description: Train pesticide handlers and agricultural workers per WPS.

title: Field Sanitation Standard
description: Provide potable water, toilets, and handwashing per OSHA field sanitation standard.

title: Agricultural Vehicle Exemptions
description: Apply agricultural vehicle exemptions to DOT hours of service and CDL requirements.

title: Agricultural Cooperative Filings
description: Apply USDA rules to agricultural cooperatives including Capper-Volstead protections.

title: Farm Program Participation
description: Comply with Farm Service Agency program requirements including AGI limits.

title: Farm Bill Compliance
description: Apply current Farm Bill commodity, conservation, and nutrition program rules.

title: Sodbuster Rules
description: Apply Sodbuster rules to limit cropland conversion of highly erodible land.

title: SPCC for Oil Storage
description: Develop SPCC plan for farms storing 1,320+ gallons of oil.

title: Grain Bin Engulfment Prevention
description: Apply OSHA grain bin engulfment prevention standards.

title: Anhydrous Ammonia Handling
description: Apply OSHA anhydrous ammonia handling standards for fertilizer use.

title: Agricultural Stormwater Exemption
description: Apply agricultural stormwater exemption per CWA Section 402(l)(1).

title: Livestock Mandatory Price Reporting
description: Report livestock transactions per USDA AMS LMPR.

title: EU AI Act for Agricultural AI
description: Classify precision agriculture AI per EU AI Act with transparency for generative systems.

title: OFAC for Agricultural Exports
description: Screen export customers against OFAC sanctions list.

title: Market Access Program
description: Apply MAP program rules for USDA export promotion cost-share.

title: International Cotton Advisory Committee
description: Comply with ICAC reporting for cotton-producing farms.

title: Federal Milk Marketing Orders
description: Comply with Federal Milk Marketing Orders for Grade A milk.

title: NOP Organic Livestock Rules
description: Apply NOP organic livestock rules including access to outdoors.

title: EU Plant Protection Regulation
description: Comply with EU Regulation 1107/2009 for plant protection products.
